entries.detail: Mike testing topics by sending messages. Only topic 1 (General) registered so far.
v3: 13 touches in 21 days (down from 31). Phone at Day 7, email at Day 6. LinkedIn-declined fork. Saved to memory/sales/13-step-sales-sequence-v3.md
Scored v2 at 8.1/10. Gaps: phone should enter earlier (Day 7 not 26), email at Day 6, LinkedIn-declined contingency needed.
60-day sequence, LinkedIn-first (Days 1-11), email intro (Day 17), phone (Day 26), breakup (Day 31), resurrection (Day 60). Saved to memory/sales/13-step-sales-sequence-v2.md
77 placements, 40+ clients. Top active: PACCAR (12), UpTop (5). Restorables: tinyBuild (6), Frazier (6), TrueBlue (3).
Training now at rylem-training repo (password-protected, code: rylem2026). rylem.com = public only.
5-layer JD breakdown, red flags, 10 pre-sourcing Qs, VMS vs Non-VMS, 4 practice JDs, quiz. Live on training site.
Searched all session logs, memory files, archives. Have 6-step cadence + 9-touch framework. No full 13-step documented yet.
M365, close model, marketing, dashboard training, Julia recordings, AI intel, open TODOs.
